# solution.py

import threading
import time
import copy
import uuid
import heapq
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from enum import Enum
from typing import Optional, List, Dict, Any, Callable
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from collections import defaultdict


class TaskStatus(Enum):
    PENDING = "pending"
    ASSIGNED = "assigned"
    IN_PROGRESS = "in_progress"
    COMPLETED = "completed"
    FAILED = "failed"
    CANCELLED = "cancelled"
    BLOCKED = "blocked"


class TaskPriority(Enum):
    CRITICAL = 1
    HIGH = 2
    MEDIUM = 3
    LOW = 4

    def __lt__(self, other):
        if isinstance(other, TaskPriority):
            return self.value < other.value
        return NotImplemented


class AgentStatus(Enum):
    AVAILABLE = "available"
    BUSY = "busy"
    UNAVAILABLE = "unavailable"
    OFFLINE = "offline"


class MessageType(Enum):
    CHAT = "chat"
    STATUS_UPDATE = "status_update"
    TASK_NOTIFICATION = "task_notification"
    SYSTEM_ALERT = "system_alert"
    COORDINATION = "coordination"


@dataclass
class Resource:
    name: str
    quantity: float = 1.0
    resource_type: str = "generic"


@dataclass
class TaskDefinition:
    task_id: str
    name: str
    description: str
    priority: TaskPriority
    required_resources: List[Resource]
    estimated_duration: Optional[float] = None  # in seconds
    dependencies: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    deadline: Optional[datetime] = None
    created_at: datetime = field(default_factory=datetime.now)
    metadata: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)


@dataclass
class TaskInstance:
    task_id: str
    definition: TaskDefinition
    status: TaskStatus = TaskStatus.PENDING
    assigned_agents: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    progress: float = 0.0  # 0.0 to 100.0
    started_at: Optional[datetime] = None
    completed_at: Optional[datetime] = None
    estimated_completion: Optional[datetime] = None
    issues: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    notes: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    history: List[Dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=list)

    def get_elapsed_time(self) -> Optional[float]:
        if self.started_at is None:
            return None
        end = self.completed_at or datetime.now()
        return (end - self.started_at).total_seconds()


@dataclass
class Agent:
    agent_id: str
    name: str
    capabilities: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    available_resources: List[Resource] = field(default_factory=list)
    status: AgentStatus = AgentStatus.AVAILABLE
    current_tasks: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    max_concurrent_tasks: int = 3
    performance_score: float = 1.0
    joined_at: datetime = field(default_factory=datetime.now)
    metadata: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)

    @property
    def is_available(self) -> bool:
        return (
            self.status == AgentStatus.AVAILABLE
            and len(self.current_tasks) < self.max_concurrent_tasks
        )


@dataclass
class Message:
    message_id: str
    sender_id: str
    recipient_id: Optional[str]  # None = broadcast
    message_type: MessageType
    content: str
    timestamp: datetime = field(default_factory=datetime.now)
    task_id: Optional[str] = None
    metadata: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)
    read_by: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)


@dataclass
class HistoryEntry:
    entry_id: str
    task_id: str
    event_type: str
    timestamp: datetime
    agent_id: Optional[str] = None
    details: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)
    notes: str = ""


class EventBus:
    """Simple pub/sub event bus for internal notifications."""

    def __init__(self):
        self._lock = threading.Lock()
        self._subscribers: Dict[str, List[Callable]] = defaultdict(list)

    def subscribe(self, event_type: str, callback: Callable) -> None:
        with self._lock:
            self._subscribers[event_type].append(callback)

    def publish(self, event_type: str, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        with self._lock:
            callbacks = list(self._subscribers.get(event_type, []))
        for cb in callbacks:
            try:
                cb(data)
            except Exception:
                pass


class TaskQueue:
    """Priority-based task queue with dynamic reordering."""

    def __init__(self):
        self._lock = threading.Lock()
        self._heap: List[tuple] = []
        self._counter = 0
        self._removed: set = set()

    def push(self, task: TaskInstance) -> None:
        with self._lock:
            entry = (
                task.definition.priority.value,
                self._counter,
                task.task_id,
            )
            heapq.heappush(self._heap, entry)
            self._counter += 1

    def pop(self) -> Optional[str]:
        with self._lock:
            while self._heap:
                _, _, task_id = heapq.heappop(self._heap)
                if task_id not in self._removed:
                    return task_id
            return None

    def remove(self, task_id: str) -> None:
        with self._lock:
            self._removed.add(task_id)

    def reprioritize(self, task: TaskInstance) -> None:
        self.remove(task.task_id)
        self._removed.discard(task.task_id)
        self.push(task)

    @property
    def size(self) -> int:
        with self._lock:
            return sum(1 for _, _, tid in self._heap if tid not in self._removed)


class MultiAgentTaskScheduler:
    """
    Coordinates and executes tasks among multiple agents with dynamic
    scheduling, real-time feedback, agent communication, and adaptive
    reorganization.
    """

    def __init__(self, now: Optional[Callable] = None):
        self._lock = threading.RLock()
        self._now = now or datetime.now
        self._tasks: Dict[str, TaskInstance] = {}
        self._agents: Dict[str, Agent] = {}
        self._messages: List[Message] = []
        self._history: List[HistoryEntry] = []
        self._task_queue = TaskQueue()
        self._event_bus = EventBus()
        self._id_counter = 0
        self._callbacks: Dict[str, List[Callable]] = defaultdict(list)

        self._event_bus.subscribe("agent_unavailable", self._handle_agent_unavailable)
        self._event_bus.subscribe("task_completed", self._handle_task_completed)
        self._event_bus.subscribe("task_added", self._handle_task_added)

    def _generate_id(self, prefix: str = "") -> str:
        with self._lock:
            self._id_counter += 1
            return f"{prefix}{self._id_counter}"

    def _record_history(
        self,
        task_id: str,
        event_type: str,
        agent_id: Optional[str] = None,
        details: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,
        notes: str = "",
    ) -> None:
        entry = HistoryEntry(
            entry_id=self._generate_id("hist_"),
            task_id=task_id,
            event_type=event_type,
            timestamp=self._now(),
            agent_id=agent_id,
            details=details or {},
            notes=notes,
        )
        self._history.append(entry)

    # ─── Agent Management ───────────────────────────────────────────────

    def register_agent(
        self,
        name: str,
        capabilities: Optional[List[str]] = None,
        available_resources: Optional[List[Resource]] = None,
        max_concurrent_tasks: int = 3,
        metadata: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,
    ) -> Agent:
        with self._lock:
            agent_id = self._generate_id("agent_")
            agent = Agent(
                agent_id=agent_id,
                name=name,
                capabilities=capabilities or [],
                available_resources=available_resources or [],
                max_concurrent_tasks=max_concurrent_tasks,
                joined_at=self._now(),
                metadata=metadata or {},
            )
            self._agents[agent_id] = agent
            return copy.deepcopy(agent)

    def update_agent_status(self, agent_id: str, status: AgentStatus) -> Agent:
        with self._lock:
            if agent_id not in self._agents:
                raise ValueError(f"Agent '{agent_id}' not found")
            agent = self._agents[agent_id]
            old_status = agent.status
            agent.status = status

            if status in (AgentStatus.UNAVAILABLE, AgentStatus.OFFLINE):
                self._event_bus.publish(
                    "agent_unavailable",
                    {"agent_id": agent_id, "old_status": old_status},
                )
            elif status == AgentStatus.AVAILABLE and old_status != AgentStatus.AVAILABLE:
                self._try_assign_pending_tasks()

            return copy.deepcopy(agent)

    def get_agent(self, agent_id: str) -> Agent:
        with self._lock:
            if agent_id not in self._agents:
                raise ValueError(f"Agent '{agent_id}' not found")
            return copy.deepcopy(self._agents[agent_id])

    def list_agents(
        self,
        status_filter: Optional[AgentStatus] = None,
        capability_filter: Optional[str] = None,
    ) -> List[Agent]:
        with self._lock:
            agents = list(self._agents.values())
            if status_filter is not None:
                agents = [a for a in agents if a.status == status_filter]
            if capability_filter is not None:
                agents = [a for a in agents if capability_filter in a.capabilities]
            return [copy.deepcopy(a) for a in agents]

    def get_agent_performance(self, agent_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        with self._lock:
            if agent_id not in self._agents:
                raise ValueError(f"Agent '{agent_id}' not found")
            agent = self._agents[agent_id]
            completed = [
                h
                for h in self._history
                if h.agent_id == agent_id and h.event_type == "task_completed"
            ]
            failed = [
                h
                for h in self._history
                if h.agent_id == agent_id and h.event_type == "task_failed"
            ]
            return {
                "agent_id": agent_id,
                "name": agent.name,
                "tasks_completed": len(completed),
                "tasks_failed": len(failed),
                "current_load": len(agent.current_tasks),
                "max_capacity": agent.max_concurrent_tasks,
                "performance_score": agent.performance_score,
                "status": agent.status.value,
            }

    # ─── Task Management ────────────────────────────────────────────────

    def create_task(
        self,
        name: str,
        description: str = "",
        priority: TaskPriority = TaskPriority.MEDIUM,
        required_resources: Optional[List[Resource]] = None,
        estimated_duration: Optional[float] = None,
        dependencies: Optional[List[str]] = None,
        deadline: Optional[datetime] = None,
        metadata: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,
    ) -> TaskInstance:
        with self._lock:
            task_id = self._generate_id("task_")
            definition = TaskDefinition(
                task_id=task_id,
                name=name,
                description=description,
                priority=priority,
                required_resources=required_resources or [],
                estimated_duration=estimated_duration,
                dependencies=dependencies or [],
                deadline=deadline,
                created_at=self._now(),
                metadata=metadata or {},
            )
            task = TaskInstance(task_id=task_id, definition=definition)
            self._tasks[task_id] = task
            self._record_history(task_id, "task_created", details={"name": name})

            # Check if dependencies are met
            if self._are_dependencies_met(task):
                self._task_queue.push(task)
                self._event_bus.publish("task_added", {"task_id": task_id})
            else:
                task.status = TaskStatus.BLOCKED

            self._try_assign_pending_tasks()
            return copy.deepcopy(task)

    def get_task(self, task_id: str) -> TaskInstance:
        with self._lock:
            if task_id not in self._tasks:
                raise ValueError(f"Task '{task_id}' not found")
            return copy.deepcopy(self._tasks[task_id])

    def update_task_progress(
        self,
        task_id: str,
        progress: float,
        agent_id: Optional[str] = None,
        notes: str = "",
        issues: Optional[List[str]] = None,
    ) -> TaskInstance:
        with self._lock:
            if task_id not in self._tasks:
                raise ValueError(f"Task '{task_id}' not found")
            task = self._tasks[task_id]
            task.progress = max(0.0, min(100.0, progress))

            if notes:
                task.notes.append(notes)
            if issues:
                task.issues.extend(issues)

            if task.definition.estimated_duration and task.started_at and progress > 0:
                elapsed = (self._now() - task.started_at).total_seconds()
                rate = progress / elapsed if elapsed > 0 else 0
                if rate > 0:
                    remaining = (100.0 - progress) / rate
                    task.estimated_completion = self._now() + timedelta(seconds=remaining)

            self._record_history(
                task_id,
                "progress_update",
                agent_id=agent_id,
                details={"progress": progress, "issues": issues or []},
                notes=notes,
            )
            task.history.append(
                {
                    "event": "progress_update",
                    "progress": progress,
                    "timestamp": self._now().isoformat(),
                    "agent_id": agent_id,
                }
            )

            if progress >= 100.0:
                self._complete_task(task_id, agent_id)

            return copy.deepcopy(task)

    def update_task_status(
        self,
        task_id: str,
        status: TaskStatus,
        agent_id: Optional[str] = None,
        notes: str = "",
    ) -> TaskInstance:
        with self._lock:
            if task_id not in self._tasks:
                raise ValueError(f"Task '{task_id}' not found")
            task = self._tasks[task_id]
            old_status = task.status
            task.status = status

            if status == TaskStatus.IN_PROGRESS and task.started_at is None:
                task.started_at = self._now()
            elif status == TaskStatus.COMPLETED:
                task.completed_at = self._now()
                task.progress = 100.0
                if task.started_at is None:
                    task.started_at = self._now()
                self._event_bus.publish("task_completed", {"task_id": task_id})
            elif status == TaskStatus.FAILED:
                task.completed_at = self._now()
                self._handle_task_failure(task_id, agent_id)
            elif status == TaskStatus.CANCELLED:
                task.completed_at = self._now()
                self._release_task_agents(task_id)

            if notes:
                task.notes.append(notes)

            self._record_history(
                task_id,
                f"status_changed_{status.value}",
                agent_id=agent_id,
                details={"old_status": old_status.value, "new_status": status.value},
                notes=notes,
            )
            task.history.append(
                {
                    "event": "status_change",
                    "old_status": old_status.value,
                    "new_status": status.value,
                    "timestamp": self._now().isoformat(),
                    "agent_id": agent_id,
                }
            )
            return copy.deepcopy(task)

    def cancel_task(self, task_id: str, reason: str = "") -> TaskInstance:
        return self.update_task_status(
            task_id, TaskStatus.CANCELLED, notes=f"Cancelled: {reason}"
        )

    def delete_task(self, task_id: str) -> None:
        with self._lock:
            if task_id not in self._tasks:
                raise ValueError(f"Task '{task_id}' not found")
            task = self._tasks[task_id]
            self._release_task_agents(task_id)
            self._task_queue.remove(task_id)
            self._record_history(task_id, "task_deleted")
            del self._tasks[task_id]

    # ─── Task Assignment ────────────────────────────────────────────────

    def assign_task(self, task_id: str, agent_id: str) -> TaskInstance:
        with self._lock:
            if task_id not in self._tasks:
                raise ValueError(f"Task '{task_id}' not found")
            if agent_id not in self._agents:
                raise ValueError(f"Agent '{agent_id}' not found")

            task = self._tasks[task_id]
            agent = self._agents[agent_id]

            if not agent.is_available:
                raise ValueError(
                    f"Agent '{agent_id}' is not available for assignment"
                )

            if agent_id not in task.assigned_agents:
                task.assigned_agents.append(agent_id)
            if task_id not in agent.current_tasks:
                agent.current_tasks.append(task_id)

            if task.status == TaskStatus.PENDING:
                task.status = TaskStatus.ASSIGNED

            self._task_queue.remove(task_id)
            self._record_history(
                task_id, "task_assigned", agent_id=agent_id
            )
            task.history.append(
                {
                    "event": "assigned",
                    "agent_id": agent_id,
                    "timestamp": self._now().isoformat(),
                }
            )

            self._send_system_message(
                agent_id,
                MessageType.TASK_NOTIFICATION,
                f"You have been assigned task '{task.definition.name}' (priority: {task.definition.priority.name})",
                task_id=task_id,
            )
            return copy.deepcopy(task)

    def reassign_task(
        self, task_id: str, from_agent_id: str, to_agent_id: str, reason: str = ""
    ) -> TaskInstance:
        with self._lock:
            if task_id not in self._tasks:
                raise ValueError(f"Task '{task_id}' not found")
            if from_agent_id not in self._agents:
                raise ValueError(f"Agent '{from_agent_id}' not found")
            if to_agent_id not in self._agents:
                raise ValueError(f"Agent '{to_agent_id}' not found")

            task = self._tasks[task_id]
            from_agent = self._agents[from_agent_id]
            to_agent = self._agents[to_agent_id]

            if not to_agent.is_available:
                raise ValueError(f"Agent '{to_agent_id}' is not available")

            if from_agent_id in task.assigned_agents:
                task.assigned_agents.remove(from_agent_id)
            if task_id in from_agent.current_tasks:
                from_agent.current_tasks.remove(task_id)

            if to_agent_id not in task.assigned_agents:
                task.assigned_agents.append(to_agent_id)
            if task_id not in to_agent.current_tasks:
                to_agent.current_tasks.append(task_id)

            self._record_history(
                task_id,
                "task_reassigned",
                agent_id=to_agent_id,
                details={
                    "from_agent": from_agent_id,
                    "to_agent": to_agent_id,
                    "reason": reason,
                },
            )
            task.history.append(
                {
                    "event": "reassigned",
                    "from_agent": from_agent_id,
                    "to_agent": to_agent_id,
                    "reason": reason,
                    "timestamp": self._now().isoformat(),
                }
            )

            self._send_system_message(
                from_agent_id,
                MessageType.TASK_NOTIFICATION,
                f"Task '{task.definition.name}' has been reassigned to another agent. Reason: {reason}",
                task_id=task_id,
            )
            self._send_system_message(
                to_agent_id,
                MessageType.TASK_NOTIFICATION,
                f"Task '{task.definition.name}' has been reassigned to you. Reason: {reason}",
                task_id=task_id,
            )
            return copy.deepcopy(task)

    def auto_assign_task(self, task_id: str) -> Optional[TaskInstance]:
        """Automatically assign a task to the best available agent."""
        with self._lock:
            if task_id not in self._tasks:
                raise ValueError(f"Task '{task_id}' not found")
            task = self._tasks[task_id]
            best_agent = self._find_best_agent(task)
            if best_agent is None:
                return None
            return self.assign_task(task_id, best_agent.agent_id)

    # ─── Communication ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

    def send_message(
        self,
        sender_id: str,
        recipient_id: Optional[str],
        content: str,
        message_type: MessageType = MessageType.CHAT,
        task_id: Optional[str] = None,
        metadata: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,
    ) -> Message:
        with self._lock:
            if sender_id not in self._agents:
                raise ValueError(f"Sender agent '{sender_id}' not found")
            if recipient_id is not None and recipient_id not in self._agents:
                raise ValueError(f"Recipient agent '{recipient_id}' not found")

            msg = Message(
                message_id=self._generate_id("msg_"),
                sender_id=sender_id,
                recipient_id=recipient_id,
                message_type=message_type,
                content=content,
                timestamp=self._now(),
                task_id=task_id,
                metadata=metadata or {},
            )
            self._messages.append(msg)
            return copy.deepcopy(msg)

    def get_messages(
        self,
        agent_id: Optional[str] = None,
        task_id: Optional[str] = None,
        message_type: Optional[MessageType] = None,
        since: Optional[datetime] = None,
        limit: int = 50,
    ) -> List[Message]:
        with self._lock:
            results = list(self._messages)
            if agent_id is not None:
                results = [
                    m
                    for m in results
                    if m.recipient_id == agent_id
                    or m.sender_id == agent_id
                    or m.recipient_id is None
                ]
            if task_id is not None:
                results = [m for m in results if m.task_id == task_id]
            if message_type is not None:
                results = [m for m in results if m.message_type == message_type]
            if since is not None:
                results = [m for m in results if m.timestamp >= since]
            results.sort(key=lambda m: m.timestamp, reverse=True)
            return [copy.deepcopy(m) for m in results[:limit]]

    def broadcast_message(
        self,
        sender_id: str,
        content: str,
        message_type: MessageType = MessageType.CHAT,
        task_id: Optional[str] = None,
    ) -> Message:
        return self.send_message(
            sender_id=sender_id,
            recipient_id=None,
            content=content,
            message_type=message_type,
            task_id=task_id,
        )

    def mark_message_read(self, message_id: str, agent_id: str) -> None:
        with self._lock:
            for msg in self._messages:
                if msg.message_id == message_id:
                    if agent_id not in msg.read_by:
                        msg.read_by.append(agent_id)
                    return
            raise ValueError(f"Message '{message_id}' not found")

    # ─── Search, Filter, Sort ───────────────────────────────────────────

    def search_tasks(
        self,
        query: Optional[str] = None,
        status_filter: Optional[TaskStatus] = None,
        priority_filter: Optional[TaskPriority] = None,
        agent_filter: Optional[str] = None,
        sort_by: str = "priority",
        sort_order: str = "asc",
        limit: int = 50,
        offset: int = 0,
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        with self._lock:
            results = list(self._tasks.values())

            if query:
                q = query.lower()
                results = [
                    t
                    for t in results
                    if q in t.definition.name.lower()
                    or q in t.definition.description.lower()
                ]
            if status_filter is not None:
                results = [t for t in results if t.status == status_filter]
            if priority_filter is not None:
                results = [
                    t for t in results if t.definition.priority == priority_filter
                ]
            if agent_filter is not None:
                results = [t for t in results if agent_filter in t.assigned_agents]

            sort_keys = {
                "priority": lambda t: t.definition.priority.value,
                "created": lambda t: t.definition.created_at,
                "name": lambda t: t.definition.name.lower(),
                "progress": lambda t: t.progress,
                "status": lambda t: t.status.value,
            }
            key_fn = sort_keys.get(sort_by, sort_keys["priority"])
            results.sort(key=key_fn, reverse=(sort_order == "desc"))

            total = len(results)
            results = results[offset : offset + limit]
            return {
                "tasks": [copy.deepcopy(t) for t in results],
                "total": total,
                "offset": offset,
                "limit": limit,
            }

    def get_task_feedback(self, task_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Get real-time feedback for a specific task."""
        with self._lock:
            if task_id not in self._tasks:
                raise ValueError(f"Task '{task_id}' not found")
            task = self._tasks[task_id]
            return {
                "task_id": task_id,
                "name": task.definition.name,
                "status": task.status.value,
                "progress": task.progress,
                "assigned_agents": list(task.assigned_agents),
                "started_at": task.started_at.isoformat() if task.started_at else None,
                "estimated_completion": (
                    task.estimated_completion.isoformat()
                    if task.estimated_completion
                    else None
                ),
                "elapsed_time": task.get_elapsed_time(),
                "issues": list(task.issues),
                "notes": list(task.notes),
                "history": list(task.history),
            }

    # ─── Dashboard & Reporting ──────────────────────────────────────────

    def get_dashboard(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        with self._lock:
            tasks = list(self._tasks.values())
            agents = list(self._agents.values())

            status_counts = defaultdict(int)
            for t in tasks:
                status_counts[t.status.value] += 1

            priority_counts = defaultdict(int)
            for t in tasks:
                priority_counts[t.definition.priority.name] += 1

            overdue = [
                t
                for t in tasks
                if t.definition.deadline
                and t.definition.deadline < self._now()
                and t.status
                not in (TaskStatus.COMPLETED, TaskStatus.CANCELLED)
            ]

            return {
                "total_tasks": len(tasks),
                "status_breakdown": dict(status_counts),
                "priority_breakdown": dict(priority_counts),
                "total_agents": len(agents),
                "available_agents": sum(1 for a in agents if a.is_available),
                "busy_agents": sum(
                    1 for a in agents if a.status == AgentStatus.BUSY
                ),
                "overdue_tasks": len(overdue),
                "queue_size": self._task_queue.size,
                "timestamp": self._now().isoformat(),
            }

    def get_history(
        self,
        task_id: Optional[str] = None,
        agent_id: Optional[str] = None,
        event_type: Optional[str] = None,
        since: Optional[datetime] = None,
        limit: int = 100,
    ) -> List[HistoryEntry]:
        with self._lock:
            entries = list(self._history)
            if task_id:
                entries = [e for e in entries if e.task_id == task_id]
            if agent_id:
                entries = [e for e in entries if e.agent_id == agent_id]
            if event_type:
                entries = [e for e in entries if e.event_type == event_type]
            if since:
                entries = [e for e in entries if e.timestamp >= since]
            entries.sort(key=lambda e: e.timestamp, reverse=True)
            return [copy.deepcopy(e) for e in entries[:limit]]

    def get_task_history_log(self, task_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Full history log for a task including start/end times, agents, notes."""
        with self._lock:
            if task_id not in self._tasks:
                raise ValueError(f"Task '{task_id}' not found")
            task = self._tasks[task_id]
            entries = [e for e in self._history if e.task_id == task_id]
            entries.sort(key=lambda e: e.timestamp)
            return {
                "task_id": task_id,
                "name": task.definition.name,
                "created_at": task.definition.created_at.isoformat(),
                "started_at": task.started_at.isoformat() if task.started_at else None,
                "completed_at": (
                    task.completed_at.isoformat() if task.completed_at else None
                ),
                "assigned_agents": list(task.assigned_agents),
                "final_status": task.status.value,
                "notes": list(task.notes),
                "issues": list(task.issues),
                "events": [
                    {
                        "event_type": e.event_type,
                        "timestamp": e.timestamp.isoformat(),
                        "agent_id": e.agent_id,
                        "details": e.details,
                        "notes": e.notes,
                    }
                    for e in entries
                ],
            }

    # ─── Adaptive Scheduling ────────────────────────────────────────────

    def reorganize_queue(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Re-evaluate and reorganize the task queue based on current conditions."""
        with self._lock:
            reassigned = []
            unblocked = []

            # Unblock tasks whose dependencies are now met
            for task in self._tasks.values():
                if task.status == TaskStatus.BLOCKED:
                    if self._are_dependencies_met(task):
                        task.status = TaskStatus.PENDING
                        self._task_queue.push(task)
                        unblocked.append(task.task_id)

            # Reprioritize tasks nearing deadlines
            for task in self._tasks.values():
                if (
                    task.definition.deadline
                    and task.status
                    in (TaskStatus.PENDING, TaskStatus.ASSIGNED)
                ):
                    time_remaining = (
                        task.definition.deadline - self._now()
                    ).total_seconds()
                    if time_remaining < 3600 and task.definition.priority != TaskPriority.CRITICAL:
                        task.definition.priority = TaskPriority.CRITICAL
                        self._task_queue.reprioritize(task)

            # Try to assign pending tasks
            assigned = self._try_assign_pending_tasks()

            # Reassign tasks from unavailable agents
            for agent in self._agents.values():
                if agent.status in (AgentStatus.UNAVAILABLE, AgentStatus.OFFLINE):
                    for tid in list(agent.current_tasks):
                        if tid in self._tasks:
                            task = self._tasks[tid]
                            if task.status not in (
                                TaskStatus.COMPLETED,
                                TaskStatus.CANCELLED,
                            ):
                                best = self._find_best_agent(task)
                                if best:
                                    self.reassign_task(
                                        tid,
                                        agent.agent_id,
                                        best.agent_id,
                                        reason="Original agent unavailable",
                                    )
                                    reassigned.append(tid)

            return {
                "unblocked": unblocked,
                "reassigned": reassigned,
                "newly_assigned": assigned,
                "queue_size": self._task_queue.size,
            }

    def register_callback(self, event_type: str, callback: Callable) -> None:
        """Register external callback for scheduler events."""
        self._event_bus.subscribe(event_type, callback)

    # ─── Internal Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────

    def _are_dependencies_met(self, task: TaskInstance) -> bool:
        for dep_id in task.definition.dependencies:
            if dep_id in self._tasks:
                dep_task = self._tasks[dep_id]
                if dep_task.status != TaskStatus.COMPLETED:
                    return False
            # If dep not found, treat as met (external dependency)
        return True

    def _find_best_agent(self, task: TaskInstance) -> Optional[Agent]:
        """Find the best available agent for a task based on capabilities and load."""
        candidates = [a for a in self._agents.values() if a.is_available]
        if not candidates:
            return None

        required_resources = {r.name for r in task.definition.required_resources}

        def score_agent(agent: Agent) -> float:
            s = 0.0
            agent_resources = {r.name for r in agent.available_resources}
            if required_resources:
                overlap = len(required_resources & agent_resources)
                s += (overlap / len(required_resources)) * 50
            else:
                s += 50

            load_ratio = len(agent.current_tasks) / max(agent.max_concurrent_tasks, 1)
            s += (1 - load_ratio) * 30
            s += agent.performance_score * 20
            return s

        candidates.sort(key=score_agent, reverse=True)
        return candidates[0]

    def _try_assign_pending_tasks(self) -> List[str]:
        """Attempt to auto-assign queued tasks to available agents."""
        assigned = []
        for task in list(self._tasks.values()):
            if task.status == TaskStatus.PENDING and not task.assigned_agents:
                best = self._find_best_agent(task)
                if best:
                    self.assign_task(task.task_id, best.agent_id)
                    assigned.append(task.task_id)
        return assigned

    def _release_task_agents(self, task_id: str) -> None:
        if task_id not in self._tasks:
            return
        task = self._tasks[task_id]
        for aid in task.assigned_agents:
            if aid in self._agents:
                agent = self._agents[aid]
                if task_id in agent.current_tasks:
                    agent.current_tasks.remove(task_id)

    def _complete_task(self, task_id: str, agent_id: Optional[str] = None) -> None:
        if task_id not in self._tasks:
            return
        task = self._tasks[task_id]
        task.status = TaskStatus.COMPLETED
        task.completed_at = self._now()
        task.progress = 100.0
        if task.started_at is None:
            task.started_at = self._now()

        self._release_task_agents(task_id)
        self._task_queue.remove(task_id)

        if agent_id and agent_id in self._agents:
            agent = self._agents[agent_id]
            agent.performance_score = min(2.0, agent.performance_score + 0.05)

        self._record_history(task_id, "task_completed", agent_id=agent_id)
        self._event_bus.publish("task_completed", {"task_id": task_id})

    def _handle_task_failure(self, task_id: str, agent_id: Optional[str] = None) -> None:
        self._release_task_agents(task_id)
        self._task_queue.remove(task_id)
        if agent_id and agent_id in self._agents:
            agent = self._agents[agent_id]
            agent.performance_score = max(0.1, agent.performance_score - 0.1)
        self._record_history(task_id, "task_failed", agent_id=agent_id)

    def _handle_agent_unavailable(self, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        """React to an agent becoming unavailable by reassigning their tasks."""
        agent_id = data.get("agent_id")
        if not agent_id or agent_id not in self._agents:
            return
        agent = self._agents[agent_id]
        for tid in list(agent.current_tasks):
            if tid in self._tasks:
                task = self._tasks[tid]
                if task.status not in (TaskStatus.COMPLETED, TaskStatus.CANCELLED):
                    task.assigned_agents = [
                        a for a in task.assigned_agents if a != agent_id
                    ]
                    task.status = TaskStatus.PENDING
                    self._task_queue.push(task)
        agent.current_tasks.clear()

    def _handle_task_completed(self, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        """Check if completing a task unblocks others."""
        completed_id = data.get("task_id")
        if not completed_id:
            return
        for task in self._tasks.values():
            if (
                task.status == TaskStatus.BLOCKED
                and completed_id in task.definition.dependencies
            ):
                if self._are_dependencies_met(task):
                    task.status = TaskStatus.PENDING
                    self._task_queue.push(task)

    def _handle_task_added(self, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        self._try_assign_pending_tasks()

    def _send_system_message(
        self,
        recipient_id: str,
        message_type: MessageType,
        content: str,
        task_id: Optional[str] = None,
    ) -> None:
        msg = Message(
            message_id=self._generate_id("msg_"),
            sender_id="system",
            recipient_id=recipient_id,
            message_type=message_type,
            content=content,
            timestamp=self._now(),
            task_id=task_id,
        )
        self._messages.append(msg)


# ─── Smoke Test ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

if __name__ == "__main__":
    scheduler = MultiAgentTaskScheduler()

    # Register agents
    a1 = scheduler.register_agent("Alice", capabilities=["python", "testing"])
    a2 = scheduler.register_agent("Bob", capabilities=["python", "devops"])
    a3 = scheduler.register_agent("Charlie", capabilities=["frontend", "design"])

    # Create tasks
    t1 = scheduler.create_task(
        name="Build API",
        description="Implement the REST API endpoints",
        priority=TaskPriority.HIGH,
        required_resources=[Resource("python")],
        estimated_duration=3600,
    )
    t2 = scheduler.create_task(
        name="Write Tests",
        description="Write unit and integration tests",
        priority=TaskPriority.MEDIUM,
        dependencies=[t1.task_id],
    )
    t3 = scheduler.create_task(
        name="Deploy",
        description="Deploy to production",
        priority=TaskPriority.CRITICAL,
        dependencies=[t1.task_id, t2.task_id],
    )

    # Check assignment
    t1_refreshed = scheduler.get_task(t1.task_id)
    assert t1_refreshed.status in (TaskStatus.ASSIGNED, TaskStatus.PENDING), (
        f"Expected ASSIGNED or PENDING, got {t1_refreshed.status}"
    )
    assert t2.status == TaskStatus.BLOCKED, f"Expected BLOCKED, got {t2.status}"
    assert t3.status == TaskStatus.BLOCKED, f"Expected BLOCKED, got {t3.status}"

    # Progress update
    scheduler.update_task_progress(t1.task_id, 50.0, agent_id=a1.agent_id)
    feedback = scheduler.get_task_feedback(t1.task_id)
    assert feedback["progress"] == 50.0

    # Complete task 1 -> should unblock task 2
    scheduler.update_task_status(t1.task_id, TaskStatus.COMPLETED, agent_id=a1.agent_id)
    t2_refreshed = scheduler.get_task(t2.task_id)
    assert t2_refreshed.status != TaskStatus.BLOCKED, (
        f"Expected t2 unblocked, got {t2_refreshed.status}"
    )

    # Communication
    msg = scheduler.send_message(
        a1.agent_id, a2.agent_id, "API is done, ready for testing"
    )
    messages = scheduler.get_messages(agent_id=a2.agent_id)
    assert len(messages) > 0

    # Search
    search_result = scheduler.search_tasks(query="API")
    assert search_result["total"] >= 1

    # Dashboard
    dashboard = scheduler.get_dashboard()
    assert dashboard["total_tasks"] == 3
    assert dashboard["total_agents"] == 3

    # History
    history = scheduler.get_history(task_id=t1.task_id)
    assert len(history) > 0

    # Agent becomes unavailable -> reorganize
    scheduler.update_agent_status(a2.agent_id, AgentStatus.UNAVAILABLE)
    reorg = scheduler.reorganize_queue()

    # Full task history log
    log = scheduler.get_task_history_log(t1.task_id)
    assert log["final_status"] == "completed"
    assert log["started_at"] is not None or log["completed_at"] is not None

    print("All smoke tests passed.")
